description: Perform a security credential rotation for the 'Logistics_Fleet_Sync_v1' OAuth application using the admin panel (admin/adminpass123). Replace 'Logistics_Fleet_Sync_v1' with a new application named 'Logistics_Fleet_Sync_v2' that maintains the identical configuration (Client Type, Authorization Grant Type, and Redirect URIs). Save the new application's Client ID and Client Secret to /home/ga/Documents/new_credentials.json in JSON format and delete the original 'Logistics_Fleet_Sync_v1' application.
